## Summary

Describe what this pull request changes and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Dashboard/UI
- [ ] Python/CLI
- [ ] Generated public data
- [ ] Tests or tooling

## Public data safety

- [ ] This uses public FDA/openFDA, NLM RxNorm, or other clearly public data only.
- [ ] This does not add patient data, hospital data, vendor files, credentials, PHI, or private operational paths.
- [ ] This does not add non-public scraping, private site automation, or license-restricted data.
- [ ] Any generated data can be reproduced from public sources.

## Verification

- [ ] I ran `python -m unittest discover -s tests`, or this is a docs-only change.
- [ ] I checked that links or dashboard changes still work where applicable.
